---
title: "R Notebook"
output: word_document
  always_allow_html: true
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(
  "PIBvsEgresados.csv"
)

df
```

```{r}
df %>% 
  kable(
    format = "html", 
    # booktabs = TRUE, 
    digits = 2,
    caption = "Distribución del ingreso por nivel educativo"
  ) %>% 
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )

# ?kable
```
